Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Sorry for all the trouble. Everything is under control now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}What happened to securing the tank...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}This is {f 0 1 33}Aigis{f 0 1 27}. As you can see, she's a machine with the form and face of a human girl.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I am Aigis. My objective is to exterminate Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I have been assigned to SEES, effective immediately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}How can a robot be this cute? What a cruel world...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Ten years ago, a plan was enacted to create anti-Shadow weapons; a contingency in the event a Shadow became unmanageable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Aigis was the last one to be made. And she's the only one that still remains today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}An anti-Shadow weapon... Does that mean she has a Persona too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Correct. I am capable of wielding the Persona called Palladion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}She suffered major damage in combat her first year out, and she's been kept in the lab ever since.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'm still not sure as to why she suddenly reactivated herself this morning...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}An anti-Shadow weapon, possessing a will all her own...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}When we first saw you earlier, you were, uh, hugging {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Yes. It is very important for me to be by his side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Hm. Maybe her facial recognition system is malfunctioning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Or maybe she's still half-asleep. Very interesting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Did you know there are a wide range of recreational facilities you can use here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}There's a tennis court, a pool table, and even a karaoke machine![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Would anyone care to hear me sing?[n]{f 1 1}
